audit_items.proof_trace: The function contains no allocations (no kmalloc/kzalloc) and no error paths — it is a void function with a straight-line spinlock + kfree + NULL assignment, so the property is vacuously satisfied. port->buf is a single flat kzalloc'd array (allocated in q6asm_map_memory_regions), and a single kfree(port->buf) correctly reclaims it; struct audio_buffer contains only a phys_addr_t and uint32_t (no nested heap pointers), so no per-element free is needed.
